或.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound (形聲): semantic 戈 + phonetic 員 (*wən, 'circle').
或.difference: Our data classifies 或 as a compound ideograph (會意), but Wiktionary classifies it as a phono-semantic compound (形聲) with 戈 as semantic and 員 as phonetic.

新.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound (形聲): phonetic 辛 + semantic 斤 ('to chop wood'); originally meant 'firewood' (薪).

己.wiki_summary: Pictogram (象形): depicts a silk rope for binding objects; original form of 紀.
己.difference: Our data classifies 己 as a simple indicative (指事), but Wiktionary classifies it as a pictogram (象形) of a silk rope.

制.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound (會意) and phono-semantic compound (形聲): semantic 衣 ('clothes') + phonetic 制; both labels are given with ideogrammic listed first.

身.wiki_summary: Pictogram (象形): depicts a pregnant woman.

果.wiki_summary: Pictogram (象形): depicts fruits hanging on a tree.

加.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound (會意): 力 ('strength') + 口 ('mouth') — to exaggerate; slander.

斯.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound (會意字): 其 (sieve) + 斤 (axe); original meaning 'to divide/break with an axe'.
斯.difference: Our data classifies 斯 as a phono-semantic compound (形聲), but Wiktionary classifies it as an ideogrammic compound (會意) composed of 其 and 斤.

月.wiki_summary: Pictogram (象形): pictographic representation of a crescent moon.
